Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We hear your concern regarding the quality of the hot coffee and have made a note of it for our team to review. Feedback like this helps us take a closer look at what we serve and continue improving the experience.

We hope you’ll consider giving us another try and allow us the opportunity to deliver the experience Coffee Island is known for.

Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly and understand your experience better.
